summary: Full E2E validation of the new forgot/reset password flow + Login improvements (demo block removed, forgot link, eye toggle, password-manager autocomplete). Backend pytest 7/7 pass. Frontend Playwright E2E fully green including token extraction from backend logs, reset, login with new password, then restore of demo1234.
critical_code_review_comments: FRONTEND_URL env var used to build reset_link is empty in preview → link in logs starts with '/reset-password?token=...'. Fine because test harness only needs the token, but for real Resend emails you must set FRONTEND_URL to the public preview/prod URL, otherwise the email link would be relative and unusable.
forgot-password endpoint has no rate limiting → an attacker could still enumerate by timing or spam tokens creation. Consider a simple in-memory/mongo rate-limit per IP+email.

password_reset_tokens collection has no TTL index on expires_at; used/expired tokens accumulate forever. Recommend `db.password_reset_tokens.create_index('expires_at', expireAfterSeconds=0)` with a real ISODate field.
test_credentials: demo@logirent.fr / demo1234 (restored at end of tests)
seed_data_creation: None. Test users created via /api/auth/register use random test-XXX@test.fr emails.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Password reset flow works end-to-end. RESEND_API_KEY empty in preview → reset link is logged as 'PASSWORD RESET LINK ... /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log'. Tests extract token via `tail /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log`. Demo credentials demo@logirent.fr/demo1234 are restored after each E2E run.
